title: Car Mechanic
description:
About the role

Are you a skilled and experienced car mechanic looking to join a reputable automotive company? AUTOCLINIC PTE. LTD. is seeking a full-time Car Mechanic to join our team. In this role, you will be responsible for diagnosing, repairing and maintaining a wide range of vehicles, ensuring our customers receive high-quality service and get back on the road safely.

What you'll be doing

1. Performing routine maintenance and inspections on vehicles
2. Diagnosing and repairing mechanical, electrical and electronic issues
3. Replacing worn or defective parts and components
4. Conducting test drives to verify repairs and maintenance work
5. Providing excellent customer service and communication
6. Adhering to all safety and quality standards
7. Maintaining detailed records of work performed


What we're looking for

1. Minimum 3 years of experience as a car mechanic in the automotive industry
2. Profound knowledge of automotive systems, including engines, transmissions, electrical systems, and more
3. Formal qualifications in automotive mechanics or a related field
4. Strong diagnostic and problem-solving skills
5. Proficiency in using diagnostic equipment and specialised tools
6. Excellent attention to detail and ability to work accurately
7. Good communication and customer service skills
8. Ability to work effectively as part of a team and efficiently in a fast-paced environment

What we offer

At AUTOCLINIC PTE. LTD., we are committed to providing a supportive and rewarding work environment for our employees. We offer competitive salaries and opportunities for career growth and development. If you're ready to take the next step in your career as a car mechanic, we encourage you to apply now.

postedCompany.description:
Autoclinic Group is an established brand management and distribution company for the world’s leading automotive aftermarket tuning brands.


Established since 1999, AutoVox, now a part of Autoclinic Group is a dedicated industry leader for the distribution of premium quality automotive accessories. Our distribution network reaches throughout South East Asia and Indo-China markets (ASEAN) and covers both B2B and B2C market segments.  


At Autoclinic, our value is built on decades of relationships through supplying renown brands with top-quality products and dependable aftersales support. Our relentless pursuit in maximizing customer satisfaction is an on-going journey of being the best at what we do, with passion and commitment.


For more information about Autoclinic Group, please visit our website: www.autoclinic.com
